name: Turkey Barbecue for Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Simmer for 10 to 15 minutes, or until flavors are blended.
3. Spoon the mixture over hamburger buns or toast.
Note: Not including bun - 176 calories, 3 lean meat + 2 vegetable exchanges, 12 grams carbohydrate, 23 grams protein, 4 grams fat, 220 mg sodium, 767 mg potassium, 54 mg cholesterol.
